Callers: Manta + Delly + GRIDSS + Scramble + MELT + SvABA + STRling. Single-caller DUP/INV excluded. gnomAD-SV v2.1 AF >1% flagged with badge (soft annotation).

Copy Number Variant (CNV) Summary
Total CNVs1473
Deletions (DEL)998
Duplications (DUP)475
Both-caller consensus (HIGH)0
GATK-only (MEDIUM)486

BOTH = CNVpytor + GATK gCNV (reciprocal overlap ≥50%). MEDIUM = GATK gCNV quality ≥30, single caller. CNVs are research-grade: no orthogonal truth set and no per-call gene annotation. CNVs overlapping a known recurrent syndrome region are promoted to Clinical Findings above; the full list of 1473 CNVs is in the companion .variants.xlsx.

Blood Group & Copy-Number Traits

Blood-group and copy-number depth traits (Rh/RHD, AMY1, GSTM1/GSTT1, Lp(a)/KIV-2) were NOT computed for COLO829: this is a tumor sample supplied as SV/CNV outputs only, with no aligned BAM available for targeted read-depth. This report covers somatic SV/CNV findings only.
